acceptance_criteria_met: GET /metrics returns 200 with Content-Type: text/plain; version=0.0.4; charset=utf-8
tps_last_call, tps_avg, tps_peak gauges with session_id label
tps_tokens_total counter with direction label (input/output), tps_api_calls_total counter
tps_model_avg, tps_model_peak with session_id and model labels
tps_provider_avg, tps_provider_peak with session_id and provider labels
prometheus.enabled config option, defaults to false
/metrics mounted on existing FastAPI app alongside /api/v1/health
verification_commands: python -c 'from prometheus_metrics import REGISTRY, update_metrics, generate_metrics; print("OK")'
